title: Stay Positive: - Recall Wins: Write Down 3 Good Things That Happened Each Day
subtitle: Focus on Positive Memories
description:
To stay positive:
- Recall wins: Write down 3 good things that happened each day.
- Reframe negatives: Think about what you learned from a tough situation.
- Celebrate progress: Look back on how far you’ve come.

Example: At the end of the week, write a short note about your best moments to revisit later.

faq.question: How do I track my progress with this habit?
faq.answer: Use the check-in method described above and track it in the Life OS app for consistent progress monitoring.

faq.question: What if I miss a day or forget to do this habit?
faq.answer: Don't worry! Life OS habits are designed to be flexible. Just get back on track the next day without judgment.

faq.question: How long does it take to form this habit?
faq.answer: Research shows habits can take 21-66 days to form. Focus on consistency rather than perfection, and use the app to build momentum.

howTo.title: Define the metric baseline
howTo.summary: Identify your current mood and recall tendencies. Track how often you notice positive events in a week to establish a baseline for improvement.

howTo.title: Commit to nightly reflections
howTo.summary: Each night, write down three good things that happened during the day. Be specific about the details and emotions associated with each event.

howTo.title: Reframe negative experiences
howTo.summary: After noting your three positives, take a moment to reflect on a negative event from the day. Write down what you learned from it to foster growth.

howTo.title: Review weekly progress
howTo.summary: At the end of the week, review your entries. Note patterns in your positive experiences and how they correlate with your mood improvements.

howTo.title: Check in with LifeOS Brali app
howTo.summary: Log your results and reflections in the Brali LifeOS app to track your progress and maintain consistency. Visit https://metalhatscats.com/life-os/three-good-things-highlights/.
